name: Spinach Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the margarine in a cast iron skillet.
2. Add the spinach and cook it quickly over medium-high heat, stirring until it is just limp.
3. Remove from heat; add the remaining ingredients and mix well.
4. Pat into an oiled 9-inch pie pan. Use a fork first, then your fingers to mold the crust.
5. Prebake for 15 minutes at 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
